de.Error: the server could not load the rad: Fehler: Der Server konnte die Radarbilder nicht vom DWD laden. Test-URL:

en.🌧️ REGENRADAR – DWD-Niederschlagsradar a: 🌧️ RAIN RADAR – DWD precipitation radar tile centred on your municipality (red dot). Images are loaded and embedded by the Symcon server – the display device needs NO external internet access. (This instance does NOT create warnings – use the "Warning centre" for that.)
en.Animation: Anzahl Zeitschritte (à 5 min): Animation: number of time steps (5 min each)
en.Die Animation läuft nur, wenn der ▶-Knop: The animation only runs while the ▶ button in the tile is pressed (for the set duration) and then stops. Source: open DWD GeoServer (maps.dwd.de) – no login required.
en.OK – %d radar images loaded (server-side: OK – %d radar images loaded (server-side). Latest ~%d KB.
en.Error: the server could not load the rad: Error: the server could not load the radar images from the DWD. Test URL:
en.Nicht konfiguriert – bitte eine Gemeinde: Not configured – please select a municipality
